title: Toy Bricks
description: A Toy Brick themed blockset - Made for ModFest Toybox
body:
[![Made for ModFest: Toybox](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/aa6c3c7b64552dc8e6d37c0677bbe46edbe9a4c7/badge/svg/toybox/compact.svg)](https://modfest.net/toybox)

### Fun with Toy Bricks!

A new vibrant blockset for your builds, with satisfying sound effects.\
Comes in every dye colour plus 4 unique colour combinations.\
Has slabs, stairs and walls.

To create them you need to first obtain and smelt raw plastic and then combine it with the dye of your choice.
